document_api_meta.title: Post Shoppable Video
document_api_meta.env_desc: Use this API to post the shoppable video.

request_header_param.name: x-tts-access-token
request_header_param.desc: The creator access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 1. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a362dccb8030ea6f98c) to get creator access_token.

request_query_param.name: app_key
request_query_param.desc: Every single app will have a unique key. Please use the specific key assigned to your app.

request_query_param.name: sign
request_query_param.desc: Signature generated by gen algorithm. When you send API requests to TTS, you must sign them so that TTS can identify the senders.

request_query_param.name: timestamp
request_query_param.desc: Unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). This timestamp is used across all API requests. Developers can use this convert to local time.

request_body_param.name: ^file_id
request_body_param.desc: Video file_id from [Upload Shoppable Video File]

request_body_param.name: ^title
request_body_param.desc:
The video caption. 
The maximum length is 2200 in UTF-16 runes.
If not specified, the ticket post will not have any captions.

request_body_param.name: ^cover_uri
request_body_param.desc: Video cover image URI, which is returned after uploading the image via the Upload Shoppable Photo File API.

request_body_param.name: ^cover_timestamp_ms
request_body_param.desc: The input parameter is a timestamp, which specifies a particular moment in the video. The frame at that timestamp will be used as the video cover. If cover_uri and cover_timestamp_ms are both not provided, the cover will default to the first frame of the uploaded video. Only one of cover_uri or cover_timestamp_ms can be provided. If both parameters are passed, cover_uri will take precedence.

request_body_param.name: ^music_id
request_body_param.desc: The music ID for the video BGM. If not provided, no music will be associated with the video. The music ID must be obtained via Search Music Library.

request_body_param.name: ^product_id
request_body_param.desc:
Use product_id to bind the product with the video.
The product_id from [Get Shop Products] or [Get Showcase Products]

request_body_param.name: ^title
request_body_param.desc: The title to be shown on the product anchor. Anchor title should be shorter than 30 characters.

response_param.name: code
response_param.desc: The success or failure status code returned in API response.

response_param.name: message
response_param.desc: The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

response_param.name: ^^id
response_param.desc: The video id, use this id to query video publish status.

error_code_list.msg: Product link title should be no longer than 30 characters.
Product link title contains offensive language.
Product link title contains punctuation or emoji.

cover_timestamp_ms exceeds the video duration.

Getting errors during video posting workflow. Please try again or contact TikTok.

sample_code.label: Curl
Go
sample_code.value:
// For more details about the SDK, refer to the documentation:
// https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/67c83e0799a75104986ae498
func affiliateCreator202603PostShoppableVideoPost() {
    configuration := apis.NewConfiguration()
    configuration.AddAppInfo(appKey, appSecret)
    apiClient := apis.NewAPIClient(configuration)
    request := apiClient.AffiliateCreatorV202603API.AffiliateCreator202603VideosPost(context.Background())
    request = request.XTtsAccessToken("your access token")
    request = request.ContentType("application/json")
    affiliateCreator202603PostShoppableVideoRequestBody := affiliateCreator_v202603.NewAffiliateCreator202603PostShoppableVideoRequestBody()
    affiliateCreator202603PostShoppableVideoRequestBodyVideoInfo := affiliateCreator_v202603.NewAffiliateCreator202603PostShoppableVideoRequestBodyVideoInfo()
    affiliateCreator202603PostShoppableVideoRequestBodyVideoInfo.SetFileId("v12d00gd0024d3nfqr7og65")
    affiliateCreator202603PostShoppableVideoRequestBodyVideoInfo.SetTitle("Sample video title")
    affiliateCreator202603PostShoppableVideoRequestBodyVideoInfo.SetCoverUri("v12d00gd0024d3nfqr7og65oooiuuyy")
    affiliateCreator202603PostShoppableVideoRequestBodyVideoInfo.SetCoverTimestampMs(1000)
    affiliateCreator202603PostShoppableVideoRequestBodyVideoInfo.SetMusicId("717294069642063456")
    affiliateCreator202603PostShoppableVideoRequestBody.SetVideoInfo(*affiliateCreator202603PostShoppableVideoRequestBodyVideoInfo)
    affiliateCreator202603PostShoppableVideoRequestBodyProductLinkInfo := affiliateCreator_v202603.NewAffiliateCreator202603PostShoppableVideoRequestBodyProductLinkInfo()
    affiliateCreator202603PostShoppableVideoRequestBodyProductLinkInfo.SetProductId("17294069642063424")
    affiliateCreator202603PostShoppableVideoRequestBodyProductLinkInfo.SetTitle("Sample product anchor title")
    affiliateCreator202603PostShoppableVideoRequestBody.SetProductLinkInfo(*affiliateCreator202603PostShoppableVideoRequestBodyProductLinkInfo)
    request = request.AffiliateCreator202603PostShoppableVideoRequestBody(*affiliateCreator202603PostShoppableVideoRequestBody)
    resp, httpResp, err := request.Execute()
    if err != nil || httpResp.StatusCode != 200 {
        fmt.Printf("productsRequest err:%v resbody:%s", err, httpResp.Body)
        return
    }
    if resp == nil {
        fmt.Printf("response is nil")
        return
    }
    if resp.GetCode()!= 0 {
        fmt.Printf("response business is error, errorCode:%d errorMessage:%s", resp.GetCode(), resp.GetMessage())
        return
    }
    respDataJson, _ := json.MarshalIndent(resp.GetData(), "", "  ")
    fmt.Println("response data:", string(respDataJson))
    return
}

Java

scope_list.package_description: You will be able to post shoppable content to the creator's TikTok account. If this content violates any TikTok Shop terms or policies, TikTok Shop may take enforcement action against the creator's account or the content.
scope_list.auth_info: The developer will be able to post shoppable content to your TikTok account. If this content violates any TikTok Shop terms or policies, TikTok Shop may take enforcement action against your account or the content.
